overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a sci-fi RPG showing a character in a white and red spacesuit exploring a dimly lit industrial office meeting room with rough stone walls, metal piping, and warm artificial lighting. The character examines a framed painting, circles a conference table, and reads a mission whiteboard before exiting.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow stone corridor with industrial piping

agents.ego_description: walking slowly along the stone wall examining the framed seascape painting and surroundings

entered.detail: gold-framed painting of a stormy seascape hanging on the stone wall
rough dark stone wall with industrial metal piping running horizontally
silver industrial pipes mounted on the wall with elbow joints
rectangular metal ventilation grate with horizontal slats
smooth wooden handrail running along the wall at waist height
large curved wooden conference table visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a narrow corridor with rough stone walls and warm artificial lighting, passing a framed seascape painting. Industrial metal pipes and a ventilation grate line the walls as the character approaches a conference area with a large wooden table visible ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: conference room with oval meeting table

events.description: character turns right to begin circling around the conference table

agents.ego_description: navigating around the conference table examining scattered papers, books, and a coffee maker on the surface

entered.detail: industrial-style coffee maker with glass carafe sitting on the table
green upholstered office chairs with metal frames arranged around the table
stacks of documents and blue folders scattered across the table surface
large whiteboard with handwritten mission notes and diagrams on the far wall
beige metal filing cabinets stacked with cardboard boxes on top

segments.scene_description: The character moves into the main conference area and begins circling a large wooden table cluttered with papers, books, and a coffee maker. Office chairs are arranged around the table while a whiteboard with mission details becomes visible at the far end of the room.

scene_state.functional_zone: mission planning area with detailed whiteboard

events.description: character stops walking and stands still to read the whiteboard content

agents.ego_description: standing still and closely examining the mission objectives and notes written on the whiteboard

entered.detail: open doorway leading to an adjacent room with green seating visible

segments.scene_description: The character approaches the far wall and stops to read a whiteboard covered with detailed mission objectives, handwritten notes, and diagrams. Filing cabinets and an open doorway are visible to the side as the camera focuses on the whiteboard text.

events.description: character turns away from whiteboard and begins walking back toward the entrance

agents.ego_description: turning away from the whiteboard and walking back through the room toward the exit

segments.scene_description: The character turns away from the whiteboard and walks back through the conference room, passing filing cabinets on the right side and heading toward the doorway. The conference table comes back into view on the right as the character approaches the exit.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a narrow industrial corridor into a cluttered conference room and back toward an exit. It begins by trailing the character past a framed seascape and metal piping along rough stone walls, moving steadily toward a large wooden table. As the character enters the main area, the camera circles the table and its scattered papers and books before shifting focus toward a whiteboard at the far end of the room. The scene then pauses as the character stops to examine the handwritten mission objectives and diagrams on the board, with filing cabinets and an open doorway visible in the periphery. Finally, the camera turns away from the wall and retreats through the room, passing the filing cabinets and the conference table once more while heading toward the exit.
